title: Completed Tag Registry JavaScript Boundary Mitigation
summary: Completed the Tag Registry JavaScript inventory mitigation by adding focused owners for list rendering, import-mode availability, service workflow and patch fallback, plus mutation-state and delete-impact series projection.
effect: The Tag Registry route now delegates render, import availability, write/fallback workflow, and successful mutation projection to route-local helpers, making future registry changes easier to review without mixing UI, service, and state-projection concerns in the route shell.
